name: Australian Foundation Investment Company Limited
analysis: AFI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 6% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$6.7600. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.8900, stop A$6.2667, target A$8.7599 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
